tldr_zh: AI領域融資熱潮持續，Anthropic與Cognition AI獲巨額投資；主要科技公司紛紛強化AI產品與安全措施，地緣政治與醫療領域亦有重大進展。
tldr_en: AI giants Anthropic and Cognition AI secure massive funding, while major tech companies enhance AI products and security; significant geopolitical and medical advancements also reported.

items.title_zh: Anthropic完成650億美元融資，估值逼近1兆美元預計上市
items.title_en: Anthropic Secures $65 Billion Funding, Nears $1 Trillion Valuation Ahead of IPO
items.summary_zh: 領先的AI新創公司Anthropic完成650億美元的H輪融資，使其估值逼近1兆美元。這可能是該公司在備受期待的首次公開募股（IPO）前最後一輪私人募資，顯示市場對其未來發展的高度信心。
items.summary_en: Leading AI startup Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H funding round, pushing its valuation close to $1 trillion. This could be the company's final private fundraising before a highly anticipated IPO, signaling strong market confidence in its future.

items.title_zh: Cognition AI獲逾10億美元D輪融資，估值飆升至260億美元
items.title_en: Cognition AI Completes Over $1 Billion D-Round Funding, Valuation Soars to $26 Billion
items.summary_zh: 專注於AI程式代理人Devin的Cognition AI公司，宣布完成超過10億美元的D輪融資，公司估值達到260億美元。此輪融資由Lux Capital、General Catalyst與8VC領投，凸顯市場對AI自動化程式開發的高度期待。
items.summary_en: Cognition AI, known for its AI coding agent Devin, announced it has completed over $1 billion in Series D funding, valuing the company at $26 billion. Led by Lux Capital, General Catalyst, and 8VC, this funding round highlights strong market anticipation for AI-driven automated software development.

items.title_zh: OpenAI發布前沿治理框架，確保AI安全與合規性
items.title_en: OpenAI Releases Frontier Governance Framework for AI Safety and Compliance
items.summary_zh: OpenAI公布其「前沿治理框架」，詳細說明公司在AI安全、資安及風險管理方面的實踐。此框架旨在與歐盟及加州新興的AI法規保持一致，展現其對負責任AI發展的承諾。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has unveiled its "Frontier Governance Framework," detailing the company's practices in AI safety, security, and risk management. This framework aims to align with emerging EU and California AI regulations, demonstrating its commitment to responsible AI development.

items.title_zh: 蘋果傳將Google Gemini模型整合至iPhone，強化Siri功能
items.title_en: Apple Reportedly Integrating Google's Gemini Model into iPhone for Enhanced Siri
items.summary_zh: 據報導，蘋果正努力將Google龐大的Gemini AI模型壓縮至iPhone中，以大幅提升Siri的智慧功能。儘管部分功能可能仍需雲端支援，此舉預示著iPhone上的AI體驗將迎來重大升級。
items.summary_en: Apple is reportedly working to distill Google's massive Gemini AI model to run on the iPhone, aiming to significantly enhance Siri's capabilities. While a cloud component will likely still be necessary for some features, this move signals a major upgrade to on-device AI experiences.

items.title_zh: Anthropic新版Claude模型更「誠實」，坦承無法支持的聲明
items.title_en: Anthropic's New Claude Model Is More "Honest," Acknowledging Unsupported Claims
items.summary_zh: Anthropic發布新版Claude Opus 4.8模型，強調其在「誠實性」方面的改進。該公司表示，新模型經過訓練，能避免做出無法支持的聲明，並在犯錯時更願意坦承，解決AI模型常見的「跳躍式結論」問題。
items.summary_en: Anthropic has released its new Claude Opus 4.8 model, highlighting improvements in "honesty." The company states the model is trained to avoid making unsupported claims and to be more transparent when it errs, addressing the common issue of AI models jumping to conclusions.

items.title_zh: Google Cloud發布AI資安防禦平台，整合Gemini強化漏洞管理
items.title_en: Google Cloud Launches AI Security Platform, Integrating Gemini for Vulnerability Management
items.summary_zh: Google Cloud推出全新的AI資安防禦平台，整合了Gemini AI、Wiz與Mandiant的技術。此平台旨在利用AI能力，協助企業更有效地排序漏洞風險並加速修補流程，全面提升雲端資安防護。
items.summary_en: Google Cloud has launched a new AI security defense platform, integrating Gemini AI, Wiz, and Mandiant technologies. This platform aims to leverage AI capabilities to help enterprises more effectively prioritize vulnerability risks and accelerate patching, thereby enhancing overall cloud security.

items.title_zh: 微軟365 Copilot改版升級，速度加倍介面更簡潔
items.title_en: Microsoft 365 Copilot Revamped with Speed Boost and Cleaner Design
items.summary_zh: 微軟推出重新設計的Microsoft 365 Copilot，宣稱載入速度提升兩倍，並提供更簡潔的介面。此次更新旨在提供更可靠、結構化的回應，讓用戶更容易瀏覽，並已陸續推播至桌面及行動裝置。
items.summary_en: Microsoft has launched a revamped version of Microsoft 365 Copilot, claiming it loads twice as fast with a cleaner design. This update aims to provide more reliable and structured responses that are easier to scan, rolling out across desktop and mobile devices.

items.title_zh: CrowdStrike與Google合作，瓦解GlassWorm軟體供應鏈蠕蟲
items.title_en: CrowdStrike and Google Collaborate to Dismantle GlassWorm Software Supply Chain Worm
items.summary_zh: 資安公司CrowdStrike與Google聯手，成功破壞了去年10月曝光的軟體供應鏈蠕蟲GlassWorm的基礎設施。該蠕蟲曾透過Visual Studio Code市集、PyPI、NPM及GitHub等平台，針對四大開發生態系發動多管齊下的攻擊。
items.summary_en: Cybersecurity firm CrowdStrike has partnered with Google to dismantle the infrastructure of the GlassWorm software supply chain worm, which emerged last October. The worm had launched multi-pronged attacks across four major development ecosystems via platforms like Visual Studio Code Marketplace, PyPI, NPM, and GitHub.

items.title_zh: 美國與伊朗接近達成協議，但尚未最終敲定
items.title_en: US and Iran "Very Close" to Deal, But Not Yet Finalized
items.summary_zh: 美國官員透露，美國與伊朗已就停火延長協議的框架達成共識，目前正等待美國總統川普與伊朗領導層的批准。儘管雙方距離達成協議已非常接近，但最終結果仍有待確認。
items.summary_en: US officials have indicated that the framework of a ceasefire extension deal has been agreed upon between the US and Iran, pending approval from President Trump and Iran's leadership. While both sides are very close to a deal, the final outcome remains to be confirmed.

items.title_zh: 尼坦雅胡指示以軍擴大加薩控制區，目標達70%領土
items.title_en: Netanyahu Directs Israeli Military to Expand Gaza Control, Targeting 70% of Territory
items.summary_zh: 以色列總理尼坦雅胡宣布，已指示以色列軍方擴大對加薩走廊的控制，初步目標是佔領這塊巴勒斯坦領土的70%。此舉將進一步壓縮當地居民的生存空間，引發國際關注。
items.summary_en: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu announced that he has instructed the Israeli military to expand its control over the Gaza Strip, with an initial target of occupying 70% of the Palestinian territory. This move will further constrict the living space for local residents and has drawn international attention.

items.title_zh: 實驗性B型肝炎藥物有望為部分患者提供「功能性治癒」
items.title_en: Experimental Hepatitis B Drug May Offer "Functional Cure" for Some Patients
items.summary_zh: 一種實驗性的B型肝炎藥物顯示出潛力，可能為部分患者提供「功能性治癒」。這項醫學突破為全球數百萬B型肝炎感染者帶來希望，有望改善長期預後並減少相關併發症。
items.summary_en: An experimental drug for hepatitis B has shown potential to offer a "functional cure" for some patients. This medical breakthrough brings hope to millions globally affected by hepatitis B, potentially improving long-term prognoses and reducing associated complications.

items.title_zh: 歐洲熱浪來襲，葡萄牙創下史上最熱五月天紀錄
items.title_en: Europe Swelters in Heatwave, Portugal Breaks Hottest May Day Record
items.summary_zh: 熱浪席捲歐洲，葡萄牙創下有紀錄以來最熱的五月天，法國學生在酷熱的教室中應考，義大利也發布紅色高溫警報。這波異常高溫凸顯氣候變遷帶來的嚴峻挑戰。
items.summary_en: A heatwave is sweeping across Europe, with Portugal recording its hottest May day on record. French students are taking exams in sweltering classrooms, and Italy has issued red alerts for high temperatures, highlighting the severe challenges posed by climate change.
